differential_diagnoses: Cryptococcal meningitis in the setting of undiagnosed Cushing's syndrome
Adrenocortical carcinoma with ectopic ACTH secretion or primary cortisol excess
Non-bacterial thrombotic endocarditis with septic emboli
next_steps: Empiric antimicrobial therapy for Listeria (ampicillin and gentamicin) and acyclovir
Urgent Cryptococcal antigen testing and fungal culture of CSF
CSF cytology and flow cytometry for malignancy
CSF PCR for tuberculosis and other viral pathogens
24-hour urine collection for free cortisol and serum ACTH measurement
Repeat neuroimaging (MRI) if compatible with vagus nerve stimulator settings or specialized protocols
